archetypes.name: Stateless Context Window
archetypes.description: No memory beyond the prompt. MessageCountingChatReducer(keep:5-10). The floor — if you score below this, something is broken.

archetypes.name: Sliding Window Agent
archetypes.description: Remembers recent context within a sliding window (20-50 messages). The most common production pattern. Good for short conversations, silently fails for long ones.

archetypes.name: Summarizing Agent
archetypes.description: Compresses history via summarization instead of dropping. Better resilience and temporal awareness, but lossy — fine details (phone numbers, dates) often lost.

archetypes.name: RAG-Enhanced Agent
archetypes.description: Facts stored in a vector database, retrieved by semantic similarity. Strong recall and organization. Temporal reasoning often degrades because embeddings lose time context.

archetypes.name: Full Persistent Memory Agent
archetypes.description: Multiple memory layers — short-term context + long-term persistent store + semantic retrieval. The gold standard. Facts survive session resets with correct temporal context.

archetypes.name: Expert Router (No Long-Term Memory)
archetypes.description: A routing agent dispatching to specialists. The router itself maintains minimal state — it knows which sub-agent to call but doesn't accumulate user facts.
